sizing_rule.note: Trade 1 unit per market system at its individually-calculated optimal f level. Use the results (expected return, variance, correlation) as inputs for portfolio model construction (Markowitz, E-V theory, etc.). This is a multi-market portfolio framework where optimal f is determined per-system then aggregated.

source_rule_text: Determine optimal f level for each individual market system by trading one unit at the optimal f level, then use these inputs as basis for portfolio models
